title: Breaking into Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #11 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: TH... THE CAT'S OUT OF THE BAG!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You... you're here because you're weak, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah, I just want to save ace!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: And... He's just giving it to me.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is the quickest way through that wall!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: All right, leave it to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's the escaping buggy the clown and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Who's that!? There are two of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is... the guard's room.....!!! So...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is the worst place to be!!!
